ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Newsletter – 2026-04-15
ham.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for subscribing to our weekly marketing newsletter! This week, we're excited to share the latest features we've rolled out, plus an exclusive offer just for you.

Highlights:
- New dashboard analytics – view real-time insights at a glance.
- Enhanced security protocols – protect your data with the newest encryption.
- Mobile app update – access all tools on the go.

Exclusive Offer: Use code WEEKLY10 at checkout to receive 10% off your next purchase.

Stay tuned for more updates next week. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or visit our support page.

Best regards,
The Marketing Team

spam.subject: Your Zoom Meeting Scheduled – Confirm Now
spam.body:
Dear [Your Name],

Your Zoom meeting has been scheduled for Thursday, 12:00 PM PST. Please confirm your attendance by clicking the link below within the next 24 hours to ensure your slot is reserved.

Meeting ID: 123-456-7890
Password: 987654

<URL>

Failure to confirm will result in a meeting cancellation and you may miss critical updates.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best,
Zoom Support
